properties.dose: Oral Light: 50-100mg Common: 100-200mg Strong: 200mg+ | Insufflated Light: 25-40mg Common: 40-100mg Strong: 100-150mg+
properties.effects: Euphoria, increased energy/alertness, decreased need for sleep, increased sociability, mood lift, increased libido, excessive talking, decreased appetite, weight loss, sweating, disturbed sleep patterns, bruxism, visual and auditory hallucinations, itchiness, aggressiveness, moodiness.
properties.summary: A substituted cathinone stimulant; little is known about its safety or subjective effects. It is believed to have similar effects to mephedrone, but with a lower potency and a stronger stimulating character.
